TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: DeAndre' Bembry unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u p'agal tins' tay suruw. DeAndre' Bembry i 2016 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 21, namapili' tu nu Atlanta Hawks putiput. 7 bulad 4 demiad, 1994 a mihca, DeAndre' Bembry, miunduay.
S.PHON: d…ôandr…ô î~ ° b…ômbrj unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u p î~ °agar~…æ tins î~ ° taj suruw. d…ôandr…ô î~ ° b…ômbrj i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu atr~…æanta ƒßawks putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, d…ôandr…ô î~ ° b…ômbrj, miunduaj.
S.FORM: DeAndre' Bembry unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u p'agal tins' tay suruw. DeAndre' Bembry i 2016 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 21, namapili' tu nu Atlanta Hawks putiput. 7 bulad 4 demiad, 1994 a mihca, DeAndre' Bembry, miunduay.
S.PHON: d…ôandr…ô î~ ° b…ômbrj unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u p î~ °agar~…æ tins î~ ° taj suruw. d…ôandr…ô î~ ° b…ômbrj i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu atr~…æanta ƒßawks putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, d…ôandr…ô î~ ° b…ômbrj, miunduaj.
